commands.purpose: Generate Docker-based Sonar templates for the detected target project stack.
commands.when_to_run: After bootstrapping the harness or when the project stack changes.
commands.failure_protocol: Record a control gap and inspect stack detection output.

commands.purpose: Run the Docker-based Sonar workflow and capture quality evidence.
commands.when_to_run: Before completion for changes that require Sonar quality evidence.
commands.success_signal: exit code 0 and Sonar scanner success
commands.failure_protocol: Run failure attribution before repair or waiver.
